title: Optimized - /by saquwu
description: Optimized - (by: saquwu) Is Based on Fabulously Optimized adding few new optimizations and functions
body:
# Optimized  - 󠀠󠀠󠁝 (by: saquwu)

**Modpack Based on Fabulously Optimized adding few new optimizations and functions**

# Why?

**I really like it and at first I couldn't believe how good the Fabulously Optimized Mod Pack is, but it's missing some features that I think would improve the overall gameplay**

**Fabulously Optimized: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)**

# What's the difference? I Added some Improvements!


![space0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7c80c7ba972be558164782225e9bacafcef6386.png)


## Clumps
**Clumps XP orbs together to reduce lag**
![Clumps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ffeead8d88d0987a9b2978aa11cd856aae646f6.webp)
**Clumps:[https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)**


![space1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7c80c7ba972be558164782225e9bacafcef6386.png)


## FastChest
**Chests static block models for improved performance**
![FastChest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76ecef76fd18b08f367c92067ad81536b03a6db5.png)
**FastChest:[https://modrinth.com/mod/fastchest](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastchest)**


![space2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7c80c7ba972be558164782225e9bacafcef6386.png)


## Bobby
**Render distances greater than the server's view-distance**
![Bobby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2223e6c71d3c8654abb1cbd2dd2ddfd69c8d734b.png)
**Bobby:[https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)**


![space3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7c80c7ba972be558164782225e9bacafcef6386.png)


## Very Many Players
**Improves server performance at high playercounts**
![VMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5964446fb9267ce1912268f8fb94c794103cdb3.png)
**VMP:[https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)**


![space4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7c80c7ba972be558164782225e9bacafcef6386.png)


## Xaero's World Map
**Adds a full screen world map**
![World Map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd63eeb04c4fca1391ccad0013971d47f196f620.png)
**Xaero's World Map:[https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)**


![space5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7c80c7ba972be558164782225e9bacafcef6386.png)


## Xaero's Minimap
**Displays a map**
(Needed for Xaero's World Map waypoints) *For more FPS turn off the Minimap in mods settings
![Minimap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/404b38583fdf722b4014c05b48c898b1192b2874.png) **Xaero's Minimap:[https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)**


![space6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7c80c7ba972be558164782225e9bacafcef6386.png)


## Essential
**Allows to play together without a server and much more**
![Essential](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0fce19dc95cd212679ad6a81ca4ab2195984d05.png)
**Essential:[https://modrinth.com/mod/essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)**


![space7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7c80c7ba972be558164782225e9bacafcef6386.png)
